rebuild SQLite with FTS5\n","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Runtime Issues"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"Database Locked"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"# Enable WAL mode
